_comment: Curated official-plugin directory served by GET /api/plugins/catalog and rendered in the Plugins ▸ Discover section (ADR 0059). The official source; keep in sync with sites/marketing/data/plugins.json. A fork can override it by placing its own plugin-catalog.json in the live config dir. `repo` is the install URL (one-click install runs `plugin install <repo>`, ADR 0058 — works on every surface incl. the frozen desktop app).

plugins.name: Discord
plugins.tagline: Run your agent as a Discord bot — inbound DMs + @-mentions, outbound send/read/react tools.

plugins.name: Artifact (Generative UI)
plugins.tagline: Render HTML/SVG/Mermaid/React into a sandboxed iframe (show_artifact). Ships built-in with protoAgent.

plugins.name: Terminal
plugins.tagline: A full terminal (xterm.js + a real PTY over WebSocket) as a console view, themed from the design system.

plugins.name: Agent Browser
plugins.tagline: Browser automation backed by vercel-labs/agent-browser: tools + skill + workflows + a live browser panel.

plugins.name: Project Board
plugins.tagline: Board-driven coding orchestration — a beads board + ACP spawn loop + planning layer + console view.

plugins.name: Portfolio
plugins.tagline: Multi-team orchestration — one PM across many project boards over A2A (ADR 0055).

plugins.name: Product Manager
plugins.tagline: PM toolkit — 65 PM skills, a provenance-enforced PM Brain, specialist subagents, and a brain dashboard.

plugins.name: SpaceTraders
plugins.tagline: Autonomous SpaceTraders fleet commander — tools, crew, workflows, skills, and a console dashboard.

plugins.name: protoTrader Finance
plugins.tagline: Market data, backtesting, factor IC, a gated paper broker, the research desk, and a Quant Desk view.

plugins.name: Monarch Money
plugins.tagline: Give your agent access to Monarch Money via its MCP server.

plugins.name: DOOM
plugins.tagline: But can it run DOOM? Play shareware DOOM in a console view via WebAssembly (prboom).

plugins.name: Career Coach
plugins.tagline: Your career coach & job-hunt copilot — strategy, mock interviews, honest CV feedback, and offer/negotiation coaching, plus an autonomous evaluate→tailor→apply pipeline. A full-surface plugin showcase.
